title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on food sustainability and global challenges.

questions.question: Do you think people should be encouraged to eat less meat? How could this be achieved?
How serious a problem do you think food waste is in modern society?
Some people say that the globalisation of food culture is causing us to lose our traditional food heritage. Do you agree?

script.text: Do you think people should be encouraged to eat less meat? How could this be achieved?
How serious a problem do you think food waste is in modern society?
Some people say that the globalisation of food culture is causing us to lose our traditional food heritage. Do you agree?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
